creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
An example of context: at <https://www.freebsd.org/ports/>, seeking package name: 

ibus-hangul


– results in <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/ports.cgi?query=ibus-hangul&stype=name>, with links out to cgit URLs such as these: 

<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/korean/ibus-hangul>
<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/plain/korean/ibus-hangul/pkg-descr?revision=HEAD>
<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/log/korean/ibus-hangul>

Compare with <https://www.freshports.org/korean/ibus-hangul/>. 

----

Documentation that refers to <https://www.freebsd.org/ports/> includes: 

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/book/#ports-overview>

<https://www.freebsd.org/ports/> does, currently, include a sidebar link to FreshPorts.
